title: Rebutia yuncharasensis
taxonomy: Rebutia yuncharasensis is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Rebutia, which is a group of small to medium-sized cacti. The species is native to Bolivia and is known for its small, globular stems with fine white spines. Rebutia yuncharasensis is often found in rocky areas and can thrive in well-draining soil. It is a popular choice among cactus enthusiasts due to its unique appearance and relatively small size.
